text.title: QA Flaky Test Root-Cause Taxonomy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Taxonomy grew to 17 categories; nobody knows when to pick which.
antipattern.root-cause: closed-enum not enforced; new labels added ad-hoc.
antipattern.fix: Reset to 8; mark unmatched cases as 'unknown' and reclassify within window.
Run weekly script flagging unknown>7d; reassign or quarantine.

antipattern.symptom: Test is wrapped in @pytest.mark.flaky(reruns=3); ledger marks it 'fixed'.
antipattern.fix: Mark as masked; require fix plan within 30d; remove rerun decorator on fix.
